items.check_zh: meta/skill-design-record.json 完整（触发/边界/协议/资源/测试/风险）。
items.check_en: meta/skill-design-record.json covers trigger, boundaries, protocol, resources, tests, risk.

items.check_zh: SKILL.md 入口尽量短；长内容在 rules/references 按需加载。
items.check_en: SKILL.md entry kept short; long content lives on-demand in rules/references.
evals/eval-cases.json includes happy, boundary, negative, and adversarial cases.

items.check_zh: analyze.py 提供确定性 findings；evals/check.py golden 套件通过。
items.check_en: analyze.py provides deterministic findings; evals/check.py golden suite passes.

items.check_zh: 关键轨迹（先分析→门控→修复→复测）有断言。
items.check_en: Critical trajectory (analyze -> gate -> fix -> re-verify) has assertions.

items.check_zh: with/without 配对评估测量对比度/点击通过率提升（v0.1 待补）。
items.check_en: Paired with/without eval measures contrast/target pass-rate lift (deferred for v0.1).

items.check_zh: meta/metric-plan.json 记录成功率/触发/稳定性/成本/长度/控制指标。
items.check_en: meta/metric-plan.json records success, activation, reliability, cost, length, control metrics.

items.check_zh: 失败样例进入 fixtures golden 回归。
items.check_en: Failure cases enter the fixtures golden regression.

items.check_zh: 文件改动有人工门；写入限制在目标目录；有回滚。
items.check_en: File edits are human-gated; writes confined to the target dir; rollback exists.
